S.FORM: ma o kika sapahnamu yamu ka ima di awi nii ka nodaan na deheya nii meyahnamu mnais a senosu ma ini osa senosu ma kika.
S.PHON: ma o kika sapaħnamu jamu ka ima di awi nii ka nodaan na deħeja nii mejaħnamu mnais a senosu ma ini osa senosu ma kika.
S.FORM: ma o kika sapahnamu yamu ka ima di awi nii ka nodaan na deheya nii meyahnamu mnais a senosu ma ini osa senosu ma kika.
S.PHON: ma o kika sapaħnamu jamu ka ima di awi nii ka nodaan na deħeja nii mejaħnamu mnais a senosu ma ini osa senosu ma kika.

TRANSL.notes: 喔.. 就是妳們的家,是誰呢,妳和Awi(Tiwas Pawan傅阿有的丈夫)的家,他們經過那兒,邀妳先生一起(到霧社),但妳先生沒去.

S.TRANSL: 喔.. 就是妳們的家,是誰呢,妳和Awi 的家,他們經過那兒,邀妳先生一起 ,但妳先生沒去.
Oh, your family member, what was his name... They passed you and Awi's house to ask your husband to go to Paran together, but your husband did not go there.

S.FORM: o ini osa.
S.PHON: o ini osa.
S.FORM: o ini osa.
S.PHON: o ini osa.

TRANSL.notes: 是,(他)沒去.

S.TRANSL: 是, 沒去.
He did not go there.

S.FORM: de bubusu de knduwa naq wada ka deheya na ini.
S.PHON: de bubusu de knduwa naq wada ka deħeja na ini.
S.FORM: de bubusu de knduwa naq wada ka deheya na ini.
S.PHON: de bubusu de knduwa naq wada ka deħeja na ini.
S.TRANSL: 而妳媽媽他們卻去了霧社,沒...
But your mother and some people went there. Not...

S.FORM: inu.
S.PHON: inu.
S.FORM: inu.
S.PHON: inu.

TRANSL.notes: (去)哪裡?

S.TRANSL: 哪裡?
You said they went where?

S.FORM: wada paran deheya.
S.PHON: wada paɾan deħeja.
S.FORM: wada paran deheya.
S.PHON: wada paɾan deħeja.
S.TRANSL: 他們去霧社?
They went to Paran?

S.FORM: ma ka wasu pgimaxun di.
S.PHON: ma ka wasu pgimaxun di.
S.FORM: ma ka wasu pgimaxun di.
S.PHON: ma ka wasu pgimaxun di.
S.TRANSL: 你怎麼把它們搞混了?
How come you mixed them up?

S.FORM: meniq moda mita yaku ka de temu mona han wa ini kii ka seediq.
S.PHON: meniq moda mita jaku ka de temu mona ħan wa ini kii ka seediq.
S.FORM: meniq moda mita yaku ka de temu mona han wa ini kii ka seediq.
S.PHON: meniq moda mita jaku ka de temu mona ħan wa ini kii ka seediq.

TRANSL.notes: 當Temu Mona來探望我的時候,那時還沒起義(殺日本人).

S.TRANSL: 當Temu Mona來探望我的時候,那時還沒起義 .

TRANSL.notes: When Temu Mona came to see me, they had not yet planned (to kill the Japanese).

S.TRANSL: When Temu Mona came to see me, they had not yet planned .

S.FORM: ciida un un.
S.PHON: ʦiida un un.
S.FORM: ciida un un.
S.PHON: ʦiida un un.
S.TRANSL: 那時.. 是的.
At that time ... You are right.

S.FORM: so kiya un ma so kusunna um so mgrebu mgrebu caman so kusun ka muda hii baso.
S.PHON: so kija un ma so kusunna um so mgɾebu mgɾebu ʦaman so kusun ka muda ħii baso.
S.FORM: so kiya un ma so kusunna um so mgrebu mgrebu caman so kusun ka muda hii baso.
S.PHON: so kija un ma so kusunna um so mgɾebu mgɾebu ʦaman so kusun ka muda ħii baso.

TRANSL.notes: 是... 隔天,隔天的一大清早Baso經過那兒(你家).

S.TRANSL: 是... 隔天,隔天的一大清早Baso經過那兒 .
It was the next day when Baso passed your house in the early morning.

S.FORM: un so kusun o um a smnipaq hasuso alang mhebu hini wa hini sapahmu sipo hako nii di.
S.PHON: un so kusun o um a smnipaq ħasuso alaŋ mħebu ħini wa ħini sapaħmu sipo ħako nii di.
S.FORM: un so kusun o um a smnipaq hasuso alang mhebu hini wa hini sapahmu sipo hako nii di.
S.PHON: un so kusun o um a smnipaq ħasuso alaŋ mħebu ħini wa ħini sapaħmu sipo ħako nii di.

TRANSL.notes: 到了第二天...殺了馬赫坡派出所(駐在所)(的日警).我家在這裡,這兒是橋頭對面的一端.

S.TRANSL: 到了第二天...殺了馬赫坡派出所 .我家在這裡,這兒是橋頭對面的一端.
On the second day, they killed the policemen at Mbehu. My house was here, just across the bridge.

S.FORM: XXXX un um alang mhebu wa hiya.
S.PHON: xxxx un um alaŋ mħebu wa ħija.
S.FORM: XXXX un um alang mhebu wa hiya.
S.PHON: xxxx un um alaŋ mħebu wa ħija.
S.TRANSL: 馬赫坡部落在那邊.
Mhebu village was there.

S.FORM: um baso baso mnoda sapahsu da.
S.PHON: um baso baso mnoda sapaħsu da.
S.FORM: um baso baso mnoda sapahsu da.
S.PHON: um baso baso mnoda sapaħsu da.

TRANSL.notes: Baso(那時)經過你家,是嗎?

S.TRANSL: Baso 經過你家,是嗎?
At that time, Baso passed your house, is that right?

S.FORM: um moda le elu naq kiya kii elunami mne moda uxe moda sapah.
S.PHON: um moda le elu naq kija kii elunami mne moda uxe moda sapaħ.
S.FORM: um moda le elu naq kiya kii elunami mne moda uxe moda sapah.
S.PHON: um moda le elu naq kija kii elunami mne moda uxe moda sapaħ.

TRANSL.notes: 那是道路(我家就在路旁),那是我們(前往霧社)的路,沒進去我家.

S.TRANSL: 那是道路 ,那是我們 的路,沒進去我家.

TRANSL.notes: That road (our house is right beside that road), was our road bounded to Baran. He did not enter our house.

S.TRANSL: That road , was our road bounded to Baran. He did not enter our house.

S.FORM: um um um um um mlawa elu.
S.PHON: um um um um um mlawa elu.
S.FORM: um um um um um mlawa elu.
S.PHON: um um um um um mlawa elu.

TRANSL.notes: 是從(站在)路上對我說的.

S.TRANSL: 是從 路上對我說的.
He said to me when standing on the road,

S.FORM: XXXX um um um iya osa paran a enaq hini kesaunkuna.
S.PHON: xxxx um um um ija osa paɾan a enaq ħini kesaunkuna.
S.FORM: XXXX um um um iya osa paran a enaq hini kesaunkuna.
S.PHON: xxxx um um um ija osa paɾan a enaq ħini kesaunkuna.
S.TRANSL: 他對我說「不要去霧社,留在這裡」.
"Do not go to Paran. Stay here."

S.FORM: um huN iniku naq mkmusa yaku.
S.PHON: um ħun iniku naq mkmusa jaku.
S.FORM: um huN iniku naq mkmusa yaku.
S.PHON: um ħun iniku naq mkmusa jaku.
S.TRANSL: 我自己是不想去的.
I myself did not want to go there.

S.FORM: un ma de bubus bubusu ka wada.
S.PHON: un ma de bubus bubusu ka wada.
S.FORM: un ma de bubus bubusu ka wada.
S.PHON: un ma de bubus bubusu ka wada.
S.TRANSL: 是你媽媽她們去了嗎?
Did your mother go there?

S.FORM: maha ka yaku kesi bubumu.
S.PHON: maħa ka jaku kesi bubumu.
S.FORM: maha ka yaku kesi bubumu.
S.PHON: maħa ka jaku kesi bubumu.
S.TRANSL: 我媽媽說她要去.
My mother said she would go there.

S.FORM: kingan bruru napa.
S.PHON: kiŋan bɾuɾu napa.
S.FORM: kingan bruru napa.
S.PHON: kiŋan bɾuɾu napa.

TRANSL.notes: 她揹回一簍(的衣物).

S.TRANSL: 她揹回一簍 .
She carried back one basket of clothes.

S.FORM: um lukus tahtunux.
S.PHON: um lukus taħtunux.
S.FORM: um lukus tahtunux.
S.PHON: um lukus taħtunux.
S.TRANSL: 是日本人的衣物嗎?
Are they the Japanese's clothes?

S.FORM: lukus tahtunux wa.
S.PHON: lukus taħtunux wa.
S.FORM: lukus tahtunux wa.
S.PHON: lukus taħtunux wa.
S.TRANSL: 是日本人的衣物.
Yes, it was the Japanese's clothes.

S.FORM: um ye wada inu di lukusna. ye
S.PHON: um je wada inu di lukusna. je
S.FORM: um ye wada inu di lukusna. ye
S.PHON: um je wada inu di lukusna. je
S.TRANSL: 那些衣物不知到哪裡去了,是否...
I do not know where those clothes went.

S.FORM: o wada wadana adisun wada s wasuna pasuwun.
S.PHON: o wada wadana adisun wada s wasuna pasuwun.
S.FORM: o wada wadana adisun wada s wasuna pasuwun.
S.PHON: o wada wadana adisun wada s wasuna pasuwun.
S.TRANSL: 那些衣物被她帶到.. 她有分給妳嗎?
She brought those clothes. Did she share them with you?

S.FORM: adisunna mhebu hiya.
S.PHON: adisunna mħebu ħija.
S.FORM: adisunna mhebu hiya.
S.PHON: adisunna mħebu ħija.
S.TRANSL: 她把衣服帶到馬赫坡部落.
She brought them to Mhebu Village.

S.FORM: inikuna.
S.PHON: inikuna.
S.FORM: inikuna.
S.PHON: inikuna.

TRANSL.notes: 沒(分給我).

S.TRANSL: 沒 .
No, she didn't.

S.FORM: meyah naq mrinah paran han.
S.PHON: mejaħ naq mɾinaħ paɾan ħan.
S.FORM: meyah naq mrinah paran han.
S.PHON: mejaħ naq mɾinaħ paɾan ħan.

TRANSL.notes: 來到霧社上空即折返(指日本偵察機).

S.TRANSL: 來到霧社上空即折返 .

TRANSL.notes: (The Japanese aircraft) came to Paran and then returned.

S.TRANSL: came to Paran and then returned.

S.FORM: qitaannamu.
S.PHON: qitaannamu.
S.FORM: qitaannamu.
S.PHON: qitaannamu.
S.TRANSL: 妳們看到了嗎?
Did you all see it?

S.FORM: qitaan meyah baro han.
S.PHON: qitaan mejaħ baɾo ħan.
S.FORM: qitaan meyah baro han.
S.PHON: qitaan mejaħ baɾo ħan.

TRANSL.notes: 看到了,因為(偵察機)飛到上面(空中).

S.TRANSL: 看到了,因為 飛到上面 .
We saw it since they flew just above us in the sky.

S.FORM: o ma meyah ini dehuk mhebu.
S.PHON: o ma mejaħ ini deħuk mħebu.
S.FORM: o ma meyah ini dehuk mhebu.
S.PHON: o ma mejaħ ini deħuk mħebu.

TRANSL.notes: 喔來到.. 沒抵達馬赫坡(上空)?

S.TRANSL: 喔來到.. 沒抵達馬赫坡 ?
Did they come over to Mhebu?

S.FORM: ini eyah han ini eyah so ciida han.
S.PHON: ini ejaħ ħan ini ejaħ so ʦiida ħan.
S.FORM: ini eyah han ini eyah so ciida han.
S.PHON: ini ejaħ ħan ini ejaħ so ʦiida ħan.

TRANSL.notes: 沒來到(馬赫坡上空),那時還沒來(到馬赫坡上空).

S.TRANSL: 沒來到 ,那時還沒來 .
No, they didn't. By that time, they had not come to Mhebu.

S.FORM: um um huN huN ma meniqsu sapah ciida dung.
S.PHON: um um ħun ħun ma meniqsu sapaħ ʦiida duŋ.
S.FORM: um um huN huN ma meniqsu sapah ciida dung.
S.PHON: um um ħun ħun ma meniqsu sapaħ ʦiida duŋ.
S.TRANSL: 是.是.那時妳還留在家裡嗎?
I see. At that moment did you still stay at home?

S.FORM: meniqku sapah.
S.PHON: meniqku sapaħ.
S.FORM: meniqku sapah.
S.PHON: meniqku sapaħ.
S.TRANSL: 我留在家裡.
Yes, I stayed home.

S.FORM: knduwasu so taqi hii ciida keeman ciida.
S.PHON: knduwasu so taqi ħii ʦiida keeman ʦiida.
S.FORM: knduwasu so taqi hii ciida keeman ciida.
S.PHON: knduwasu so taqi ħii ʦiida keeman ʦiida.
S.TRANSL: 那天晚上妳還是在自己家過夜嗎?
Did you sleep at home alone that night?

S.FORM: taqiku hiya han um.
S.PHON: taqiku ħija ħan um.
S.FORM: taqiku hiya han um.
S.PHON: taqiku ħija ħan um.
S.TRANSL: 我還是在那裡睡.
Yes, I still slept there.

S.FORM: anu so kusun du wa um kiya so knuwan meyah mhebu sapah skiya da pawan.
S.PHON: anu so kusun du wa um kija so knuwan mejaħ mħebu sapaħ skija da pawan.
S.FORM: anu so kusun du wa um kiya so knuwan meyah mhebu sapah skiya da pawan.
S.PHON: anu so kusun du wa um kija so knuwan mejaħ mħebu sapaħ skija da pawan.

TRANSL.notes: 到了第二天.. ,Pawan(蔡茂琳),飛機飛到馬赫坡上空是什麼時候?

S.TRANSL: 到了第二天.. ,Pawan ,飛機飛到馬赫坡上空是什麼時候?
When it was the following day... Pawan, when did the aircraft come to Mhebu?

S.FORM: kii da so kusun.
S.PHON: kii da so kusun.
S.FORM: kii da so kusun.
S.PHON: kii da so kusun.
S.TRANSL: 就是第二天了.
It was exactly the following day.

S.FORM: meyah so kusun kika ma.
S.PHON: mejaħ so kusun kika ma.
S.FORM: meyah so kusun kika ma.
S.PHON: mejaħ so kusun kika ma.
S.TRANSL: 隔天來了.
They came on the following day.

S.FORM: kika mesa posai hata kana han.
S.PHON: kika mesa posai ħata kana ħan.
S.FORM: kika mesa posai hata kana han.
S.PHON: kika mesa posai ħata kana ħan.

TRANSL.notes: 所以族人們說大家要懸掛(日本)旗子.

S.TRANSL: 所以族人們說大家要懸掛 旗子.

TRANSL.notes: So we all hung the (Japanese) flags.

S.TRANSL: So we all hung the flags.

S.FORM: uxe na pawan.
S.PHON: uxe na pawan.
S.FORM: uxe na pawan.
S.PHON: uxe na pawan.
S.TRANSL: 還不是那個時候哦 Pawan.
No, it wasn't at that time, Pawan.

S.FORM: kwana naq msseli hii kana neyah puku di.
S.PHON: kwana naq msseli ħii kana nejaħ puku di.
S.FORM: kwana naq msseli hii kana neyah puku di.
S.PHON: kwana naq msseli ħii kana nejaħ puku di.
S.TRANSL: Suku的族人怎麼可能會那麼快在那兒集結?
How come Suku people gathered there so quickly?

S.FORM: bakudang.
S.PHON: bakudaŋ.
S.FORM: bakudang.
S.PHON: bakudaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 炸彈.
A bomb attack.

S.FORM: um ye qnqda hikoki kii.
S.PHON: um je qnqda ħikoki kii.
S.FORM: um ye qnqda hikoki kii.
S.PHON: um je qnqda ħikoki kii.
S.TRANSL: 嗯... 那可能是飛機投下的炸彈.
It seems that the aircraft dropped the bombs.

S.FORM: gisu tggarang kana a so supih.
S.PHON: gisu tggaɾaŋ kana a so supiħ.
S.FORM: gisu tggarang kana a so supih.
S.PHON: gisu tggaɾaŋ kana a so supiħ.

TRANSL.notes: 鍋子(炊具)到處散落(因炸彈爆炸所致).

S.TRANSL: 鍋子 到處散落 .
The pans were scatterd all over the place.

S.FORM: XXXX mili yenamu ye ado uxe qmnita ho hikoki ma kika mosa dmeeda. XXXX
S.PHON: xxxx mili jenamu je ado uxe qmnita ħo ħikoki ma kika mosa dmeeda. xxxx
S.FORM: XXXX mili yenamu ye ado uxe qmnita ho hikoki ma kika mosa dmeeda. XXXX
S.PHON: xxxx mili jenamu je ado uxe qmnita ħo ħikoki ma kika mosa dmeeda. xxxx

TRANSL.notes: 你們是否... 是否由於(族人們)沒見過飛機,所以族人去觀看(飛機)?

S.TRANSL: 你們是否... 是否由於 沒見過飛機,所以族人去觀看 ?
Is it because you had not ever seen any aircraft, our people just went to see them?

S.FORM: un mosa mesa mqiri.
S.PHON: un mosa mesa mqiɾi.
S.FORM: un mosa mesa mqiri.
S.PHON: un mosa mesa mqiɾi.
S.TRANSL: 是的,因而去探頭看看.
That's right. We extended our heads out to see them.

S.FORM: yena hilie mesa maanu na.
S.PHON: jena ħilie mesa maanu na.
S.FORM: yena hilie mesa maanu na.
S.PHON: jena ħilie mesa maanu na.

TRANSL.notes: 族人們以為(飛機)是何物?

S.TRANSL: 族人們以為 是何物?
Did our people wonder what that was in the sky?

S.FORM: ini ini gleeng mekan mudu u musa naq mekan mudu baro ma qmita naq hiya ini ini.
S.PHON: ini ini gleeŋ mekan mudu u musa naq mekan mudu baɾo ma qmita naq ħija ini ini.
S.FORM: ini ini gleeng mekan mudu u musa naq mekan mudu baro ma qmita naq hiya ini ini.
S.PHON: ini ini gleeŋ mekan mudu u musa naq mekan mudu baɾo ma qmita naq ħija ini ini.

TRANSL.notes: 在吃橘子的族人們就不躲藏,他們在橘子樹上吃著橘子,在那裡看著(飛機).

S.TRANSL: 在吃橘子的族人們就不躲藏,他們在橘子樹上吃著橘子,在那裡看著 .
Those who ate oranges did not escape. They were just eating oranges in the trees, watching the aircraft from there.

S.FORM: qitaina ma ini qduriq.
S.PHON: qitaina ma ini qduɾiq.
S.FORM: qitaina ma ini qduriq.
S.PHON: qitaina ma ini qduɾiq.
S.TRANSL: 他們沒逃開.
They did not run away.

S.FORM: seediq naq mhebu ciida.
S.PHON: seediq naq mħebu ʦiida.
S.FORM: seediq naq mhebu ciida.
S.PHON: seediq naq mħebu ʦiida.
S.TRANSL: 當時僅是馬赫坡部落的族人嗎?
At that time, were there only people of Mhebu?

S.FORM: kana kana XXXX o kana seediq msuupunami hiya kana da.
S.PHON: kana kana xxxx o kana seediq msuupunami ħija kana da.
S.FORM: kana kana XXXX o kana seediq msuupunami hiya kana da.
S.PHON: kana kana xxxx o kana seediq msuupunami ħija kana da.
S.TRANSL: 所有的族人都在.
All of our people were there.

S.FORM: tena suupu di kana.
S.PHON: tena suupu di kana.
S.FORM: tena suupu di kana.
S.PHON: tena suupu di kana.
S.TRANSL: 已聚集在一起了嗎?
Did you already gather there?

S.FORM: o kana ka kingan kumi mnkuni di peni um um um dehuk hiya kana seediq di.
S.PHON: o kana ka kiŋan kumi mnkuni di peni um um um deħuk ħija kana seediq di.
S.FORM: o kana ka kingan kumi mnkuni di peni um um um dehuk hiya kana seediq di.
S.PHON: o kana ka kiŋan kumi mnkuni di peni um um um deħuk ħija kana seediq di.

TRANSL.notes: 當時起義抗日的一組人馬(六個部落族人)都(在馬赫坡部落)聚集.

S.TRANSL: 當時起義抗日的一組人馬 都 聚集.

TRANSL.notes: All the people (of the six villages who protested against Japanese) gathered there.

S.TRANSL: All the people gathered there.

S.FORM: smalu a halung limuk halung kiya a um XXXX peni um musa rmengo kiya rmengo hikoki di na.
S.PHON: smalu a ħaluŋ limuk ħaluŋ kija a um xxxx peni um musa ɾmeŋo kija ɾmeŋo ħikoki di na.
S.FORM: smalu a halung limuk halung kiya a um XXXX peni um musa rmengo kiya rmengo hikoki di na.
S.PHON: smalu a ħaluŋ limuk ħaluŋ kija a um xxxx peni um musa ɾmeŋo kija ɾmeŋo ħikoki di na.
S.TRANSL: 製作槍彈... 那是槍枝要用的子彈... 去... 飛機...
We made guns and bullets. They are bullets for the guns. The airplane went...

S.FORM: wisu hokoki bino ma.
S.PHON: wisu ħokoki bino ma.
S.FORM: wisu hokoki bino ma.
S.PHON: wisu ħokoki bino ma.

When the aircraft approached us,
